content.full_text:
California Fair Political Practices Commission

January 14, 1992

Mr. David John Watchtel  
6546 Hollywood Blvd., Suite 201  
Hollywood, California 90028

Re: Your Request for Advice  
Our File No. G-92-18

Dear Mr. Watchtel:

We are in receipt of your letter dated December 29, 1991. You requested two each of any forms necessary to be a write-in candidate for a position on the Santa Monica City Council. Additionally, you requested information about the legality of simultaneous candidacy for Vice President or President and the Santa Monica City Council. Your letter has been forwarded to the Secretary of State, 1230 J Street, Sacramento, California, 95814 for response.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin  
Acting General Counsel

by [signature]  
Jill Stecher  
Counsel, Legal Division

SH:JS:ken
